name: Blue Valley Recreation Center at Hilltop
description:
Need day pass @$15 or membership that starts at $45/mo resident or $55/month non resident

Open Pickleball Rules
When courts are full, players take turns by stacking paddles, allowing others to play.
When games are finished the players will leave the court and allow the next players to rotate on.
Players may not place multiple paddles on the stacking area to reduce their wait time.
Games are played to 11 points or a 15 minute MAX time limit before rotating off.
At no time will any player move another persons paddle.
Nets may only be moved by a staff member
fees: Members only — Need day pass @$15 or membership that starts at $45/mo resident or $55/month non resident
